hero.tagline: Building clean, scalable software from mobile apps to databases.

about.title: About Me
about.summary: 4th-year Computer Engineering student passionate about software development, equipped with solid technical foundations. Looking for a first professional opportunity to join a team, add value, and continue growing in the tech sector.

education.title: Education
highlights: Double major in Information Systems & Information Technologies
Master 1 level coursework in Software Engineering & BigData

entries.specialization: Double major: Information Systems & Information Technologies
entries.description: Pursuing a degree in Computer Engineering with a focus on Information Systems and Information Technologies.
Spring Semester exchange program focusing on Software Engineering and BigData technologies.

items.description: Solo development of an Android app using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose with MVVM architecture. Integrated AI services and REST APIs with async network optimization using Coroutines to reduce redundant requests.
highlights: Solo development of complete Android application

items.description: Managed a development team to build a Single Page Application with Dragon Ball theme. Integrated external Dragon Ball API via async services with modular Angular/TypeScript architecture.
Designed relational database structure (ER Model) using MySQL Workbench and Microsoft Access. Developed and optimized complex SQL queries for data retrieval and integrity.

Full design and development of my personal portfolio: multilingual SPA (ES/EN/FR) with React 19 and TypeScript, type-safe full-stack architecture via tRPC v11 + Express, context-aware AI chatbot with Claude API, smooth animations with Framer Motion, responsive dark-mode UI with Tailwind CSS v4 & shadcn/ui, and end-to-end schema validation with Zod.
highlights: Type-safe full-stack architecture: React 19 + tRPC v11 + Express + Zod
Complete ES/EN/FR i18n with i18next and automatic browser language detection
Dynamic AI chatbot powered by Claude API with profile-based contextual system prompt
Responsive dark-mode UI with Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui and custom CSS variables
Advanced scroll, hover and entry animations with Framer Motion
Modular, reusable component architecture designed for scalability

items.description: Contributed to the development and improvement of features for the DriveAlong project. Collaboration on an open source assisted driving project, delivering code improvements and new features.
highlights: Active contribution to open source project

items.title: Statistics Award — Baccalaureate
items.subtitle: XI Southern Contest 2022
items.description: Recognition in the regional baccalaureate statistics contest, standing out for the quality and methodological rigor of the submitted work.

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.subtitle: A comprehensive overview of my technical expertise across different domains
skills.continuous_learning_text: I'm constantly expanding my technical knowledge and staying updated with the latest technologies in software development. My experience spans across multiple domains, allowing me to approach problems from different perspectives.
learning_items: Strong foundation in software engineering principles and design patterns
Experience with both frontend and backend development
Mobile development expertise with modern frameworks

details.fr: Intermediate French B1/B2 with exchange experience in Toulon, France

interests.title: Interests & Hobbies
interests.subtitle: Beyond coding, I'm passionate about various activities that challenge and inspire me.

running.philosophy_text: Running is my escape and my challenge. Every kilometer is an opportunity to push my limits, improve my mental health, and discover new places. I believe in consistency over intensity, and I'm always working to beat my personal records.

chess.philosophy_text: Chess is my intellectual playground. It teaches me strategy, patience, and decision-making under pressure. I enjoy all time controls and am always working to improve my rating and understanding of the game.

learning.title: 📚 Continuous Learning
learning.text: I'm passionate about expanding my knowledge through courses, books, and hands-on projects. Currently exploring advanced topics in software architecture, cloud computing, and emerging technologies.

other.title: ⚡ Other Interests
other.text: Beyond my main hobbies, I enjoy exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, and connecting with the tech community. I'm always open to new experiences and learning opportunities.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: I'm always interested in hearing about new opportunities and projects.
contact.open_text: I'm actively looking for my first professional opportunity in software development.
contact.success_text: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
